title: Lines Written On A Window Of The Globe Tavern, Dumfries.
content:
The greybeard, old Wisdom, may boast of his treasures,
            Give me with gay Folly to live;
        I grant him his calm-blooded, time-settled pleasures,
            But Folly has raptures to give.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "Lines Written On A Window Of The Globe Tavern, Dumfries."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
